positioning: Small, auditable software and evidence delivery for ecommerce product scraping, AI automation, LLM prompt workflow audits, source-cited research briefs, YouTube hook and retention notes, channel positioning, consulting-style report design, spreadsheet and lead-list cleanup, Excel financial model audits, WordPress critical-error quick fixes, site malware cleanup and uptime triage, QA evidence packets, Node.js product APIs, API integrations, AI coding evaluation, agent-tool safety, x402 payment safety, WordPress AI SEO plugins, WooCommerce email repair, workflow repair, and GitHub CI/PR rescue.
